# STRAT.018 ? First Principles Thinking (Musk/Bezos)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** business_strategy
**Domain:** BUSINESS_STRATEGY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Break down to fundamental truths; rebuild from ground up; question all assumptions; avoid reasoning by analogy; fundamental physics

## Application
Identify fundamental truths; question every assumption; reason from first principles not analogies; rebuild solution from basics

## Key Values
- Fundamental truths
- Assumption questioning
- Ground-up thinking
- Anti-analogy
- Basic physics

philosophy, strategic-framework, business_strategy
